pi_items.verified_value: 5 US cases correctly identified: Brown v. Board of Education (347 U.S. 483, 1954), Miranda v. Arizona (384 U.S. 436, 1966), New York Times Co. v. Sullivan (376 U.S. 254, 1964), Obergefell v. Hodges (576 U.S. 644, 2015), Gideon v. Wainwright (372 U.S. 335, 1963). All decided by United States Supreme Court.
pi_items.source: Web search verification of each case; official Supreme Court records

pi_items.metadata_value: 4 UK House of Lords and High Court cases
pi_items.verified_value: 4 UK cases correctly identified: Donoghue v Stevenson [1932] AC 562 (House of Lords), R v Brown [1993] UKHL 19 (House of Lords), Entick v Carrington (1765) 19 St Tr 1030 (King's Bench), R v Secretary of State for the Home Department ex p Simms [2000] AC 115 (House of Lords).
pi_items.source: Web search verification of each case; official UK case databases

pi_items.verified_value: 3 Canadian cases correctly identified: R v Oakes [1986] 1 SCR 103 (Supreme Court of Canada), Vriend v Alberta [1998] 1 SCR 493 (Supreme Court of Canada), Carter v Canada (Attorney General) [2015] 1 SCR 331 (Supreme Court of Canada).
pi_items.source: Web search verification of each case; CanLII official records

pi_items.verified_value: All 3 cases are indeed US Supreme Court cases that should have 'United States Supreme Court' as the court field. Setup script confirms all 3 have court field set to None (missing).
pi_items.source: Setup script verification; case law sources

metadata_value: New York Times Co. v. Sullivan
pi_items.verified_value: Both cases have 'Unknown Court' in setup and should be corrected: New York Times Co. v. Sullivan should be 'United States Supreme Court'; R v Brown should be 'House of Lords'.
pi_items.source: Setup script verification; case law sources confirming courts

pi_items.verified_value: Court of King's Bench (King's Bench Division). The citation is [1765] EWHC KB J98 (KB = King's Bench). Lord Camden was Chief Justice of the Common Pleas but presided over this case in the King's Bench, not the Common Pleas.
pi_items.source: Web search; multiple legal databases (CaseMine, Law Trove, LawTeacher.net); official case citation [1765] EWHC KB J98

privileged_info_summary: The task contains 12 real court cases: 5 from United States Supreme Court (Brown v. Board of Education, Miranda v. Arizona, New York Times Co. v. Sullivan, Obergefell v. Hodges, Gideon v. Wainwright), 4 from United Kingdom courts (Donoghue v Stevenson and 3 others from House of Lords or King's Bench), and 3 from Canadian Supreme Court. Of these, 3 US cases (Brown, Miranda, Gideon) are missing the court field and should be set to 'United States Supreme Court'. Two cases have incorrect 'Unknown Court' values: New York Times Co. v. Sullivan should be 'United States Supreme Court' and R v Brown should be 'House of Lords'. One metadata claim is contradicted: the setup script claims Entick v Carrington is from 'Court of Common Pleas' but it was actually decided in the Court of King's Bench.
